info.title: dotnet-get-the-fork-out
info.description: A dotnet tool to delete GitHub forks for a user.

options.name: --i-know-what-i-am-doing
options.description:
No prompts will be shown.
WARNING: All forks will automatically be
deleted

arguments.name: GITHUB_API_KEY
arguments.description:
The GitHub API key to use.
The API key must have the following permissions:
public_repo, delete:packages
